revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before production:

1. QUOTE NORMALIZATION (minor but systematic): Three instances cite 'She had pancreatic cancer' when the transcript reads 'Shed pancreatic cancer' (likely a Deepgram transcription artifact). Normalize all three to match the actual transcript text. Do not silently correct Deepgram artifacts — quote verbatim and note the likely transcription error if relevant.

2. SCHEMA CITATION CORRECTION (cherry_pick_moments[4]): The protocol_violation at 11:07 cites 'button_up.no_driving_at_computer' as the governing element for the phone vs in-person format mismatch. The correct citation is 'button_up.phone_appointment_specified.' Update the schema_reference and adjust the coaching_implication to reference the correct element.

3. CREDIT QUALIFIER REASONING (cherry_pick_moments[5] and coaching_focus): Stage 3 treats Bucky's acceptance of 'I have no idea' on credit as a definitive coaching failure. The schema explicitly marks the setter credit-DQ policy as TBD pending Kenny's resolution. Revise the stewart_read and coaching_implication to acknowledge the policy ambiguity: flag for closer to confirm credit, note the TBD policy question, and avoid framing Bucky's 'That's fine' as a clear procedural error until Kenny resolves whether setters should DQ on stated credit or pass through to the closer's pull.

4. ADD MISSED MOMENTS TO cherry_pick_moments: Two missed moments require addition as cherry_pick entries: (a) 00:44 — Caitlin's 'No. No. No. No. No. I'm not all good. I want to talk to you about the solar vehicle' as a flip_opportunity_detection / verify.interest_in_solar miss (Bucky inverted the dynamic so the customer was leading the pitch instead of anchoring her stated interest); (b) 04:28 — 'I've already paid off the house' as an enthusiasm_signal / high_value_lead_indicator that Bucky did not acknowledge or anchor. The conditional_booking_detection at 09:33 (Thursday travel constraint) should also be added to both cherry_pick_moments and the handoff_brief as a time-sensitive flag. The rep-attention gap at 10:39 (multitasking/dog disclosure) should be added as a time_burn_detection note.

SECONDARY (no rerun required, fix in place): Revise trajectory_verdict.shape from 'stagnant' to 'customer-driven' or equivalent — the call had meaningful emotional movement and 'stagnant' misrepresents the arc. Tighten coaching_focus[0].why to remove the unsupported generalization that this is 'a pattern the rep will carry into every call' — that claim requires multi-call data on Bucky that Stage 3 does not have.
